pulse_laser.name: Pulse Laser Cannon
pulse_laser.desc: Energy wave emitter. Extremely effective against dynamic shielding layers, dispersed on hull plates.

pulse_laser_mk2.name: Pulse Laser MK2
pulse_laser_mk2.desc: Upgraded plasma focus lens. Devastates defensive energy buffers.

pulse_laser_mk3.name: Pulse Laser MK3
pulse_laser_mk3.desc: Military grade laser array. Melts shields instantly.

torpedo_launcher.name: HE Torpedo Tube
torpedo_launcher.desc: Launches fusion explosive warheads. Ignores 30% shielding parameters, shreds steel hulls.

torpedo_launcher_mk2.name: HE Torpedo Tube MK2
torpedo_launcher_mk2.desc: Fitted with high-velocity launch rails. Amplifies launcher base yield.

torpedo_launcher_mk3.name: HE Torpedo Tube MK3
torpedo_launcher_mk3.desc: Super-duty dreadnought deployment array. Exterminates hull frame plates.

ion_blaster.name: Heavy Ion Array
ion_blaster.desc: Disrupts internal electrical conduits. Temporarily disables secondary weapons system arrays.

ion_blaster_mk2.name: Heavy Ion Array MK2
ion_blaster_mk2.desc: Supercharged electronic sweep disruptor. Cripples hostiles.

plasma_spike.name: Plasma Thermal Beam
plasma_spike.desc: Compressed thermal core burner. Balanced structural fusion damage payload targeting shielding and plating uniformly.

plasma_spike_mk2.name: Plasma Thermal MK2
plasma_spike_mk2.desc: Overcharged atomic burner. Evaporates titanium hull panels uniformally.

exclusive_railgun_mk4.name: Hyper-Velocity Railgun MK4
exclusive_railgun_mk4.desc: Elite specialized railgun launcher that fires heavy kinetic slugs. Bypasses shielding entirely.

experimental_singularity_mkx.name: Singularity Decimator MKX
experimental_singularity_mkx.desc: Classified hyper-tech singularity core launcher. Instantly folds surrounding spatial envelopes to collapse enemy vessels.

sentient_chatterbox.name: Sentient Chatterbox Laser
sentient_chatterbox.desc: Stupidly cheap sentient gun. Chatters in log. 25% chance to insult target for +30% damage, but 15% chance to get distracted and miss entirely.

retro_fission.name: Retro-Grade Fission Blaster
retro_fission.desc: Stupidly cheap and highly dangerous prototype. 12% chance to misfire and hit the player's own shield for 15 damage.

consortium_gold.name: Consortium Golden Cannon
consortium_gold.desc: Ludicrously expensive weapon crafted for elite trade oligarchs. Consumes 10 Credits per shot to double its damage! Shoots rusty dust (10% damage) if you run out of cash.

void_paradox.name: Void-Core Paradox Beam
void_paradox.desc: Unstable spacefold device. 15% chance to accidentally heal target for 20 Hull, but 15% chance to instantly disintegrate enemy's shields to 0.

pulse_laser_mk5.name: Pulse Laser Cannon MK5
pulse_laser_mk5.desc: God-tier pulse laser. Destroys all obstacles instantly with high-yield tachyon plasma discharges.

emp_shockwave_launcher_mk1.name: EMP Shockwave Launcher MK1
emp_shockwave_launcher_mk1.desc: Exotic electromagnetic disruptor. Unleashes high-intensity spherical flux pulses that fry sub-system circuitry and disable armament arrays.
